---
title: "Regional Data Studio Report"
output: html_document
params:
  csv_path: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df <- read_csv(params$csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# Dataset Summary

```{r}
glimpse(df)
```

# County Counts

```{r}
df %>%
  count(county, sort = TRUE)
```

# Metric Trend

```{r}
if ("year" %in% names(df) && "metric_value" %in% names(df)) {
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(metric_value)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = metric_value)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)
}
```
